description_long: This object is a Santa Claus-themed doll dressed in a classic red suit with white fur trim and a black belt. The doll's suit appears plush and padded, with visible seams and a slightly worn texture, especially around the edges. The hands are beige, mimicking skin tone, and the boots are black, though the feet and lower legs show signs of damage or wear. The head is missing or severely damaged, with only the back of the red hat and some white trim visible. The overall form is soft and rounded, suggesting a stuffed or plush construction. The doll's clothing and color scheme are instantly recognizable as inspired by traditional Christmas Santa Claus imagery.
description: A plush Santa Claus doll in a red suit with white trim and a black belt, missing its head and showing signs of wear, especially on the feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red suit, white fur trim, black belt, beige hands, and damaged feet; head is missing.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the red suit, black belt, and the back of the red hat with white trim.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the profile of the red suit, arm, and the extent of damage to the feet and head area.
description_view_3: Bottom view revealing the underside of the doll, with visible stuffing and significant wear on the feet and lower body.
attribute_clothing_style: Classic Santa Claus outfit consisting of a red plush suit with white faux fur trim, a black belt, and black boots, inspired by traditional Christmas attire.
attribute_pose: The doll is lying prone with arms and legs slightly spread; the head is missing, and the limbs are in a relaxed, static position.
attribute_facial_expression: Not visible; the head and face are missing or severely damaged.
attribute_hair_style: Not visible; the head and hair are missing or obscured.
